steps.title: Read slope from the parallel line
steps.content: Line $s$ is parallel to $y = 15x + 4$. Parallel lines have equal slopes, so slope of $s$ $= 15$.

steps.title: Write line s through the origin and evaluate at x = 5
steps.content: Line $s$ passes through $(0, 0)$ with slope $15$: $y = 15x$. Substitute $x = 5$: $d = 15 \times 5 = 75$. That confirms C is correct.
